title: Twitter
questions: What springs to mind when you hear the word 'Twitter'?
What do you think of the name Twitter for a website?
What did you think when you first heard of / used Twitter?
Do you think 140 characters are enough for the Twitter updates?
Why do you think Twitter is so successful?
How does Twitter compare with other social networking sites?
How do you think Twitter makes money?
How could Twitter make more money?
Why do you think Twitter chose a small bird as its logo?
What would you like Twitter to do differently?
What do you think of Twitter?
What do you think of Twitter's slogan, "What are you doing"?
What Twitter sites do you follow / like?
How many people would you like to follow your Twitter site?
What do you think of the word 'tweet' (meaning a message posted on Twitter)?
Who do you think Twitter is most useful for?
Is your life interesting enough to tweet about?
Which famous person would you like to follow on Twitter and why?
What questions would you like to ask Twitter's owners?
